text: Breaking: The Federal Reserve has announced a 0.25% interest rate hike, marking the fourth consecutive increase this year.
I can't stop thinking about what happened between us last night. I don't know if I'll ever feel the same way about anyone again.
Just tried the new ramen place downtown and honestly the spicy miso was pretty solid. Would recommend if you like thick noodles.
Today marks 5 years since my father passed away. I still hear his voice in my head every morning telling me to keep going. Miss you, Dad.
Je me suis finalement inscrit a la salle de sport. On verra combien de temps ca dure cette fois-ci lol.
Estoy luchando con la ansiedad otra vez. No le he dicho a nadie pero hay dias que no puedo ni salir de la cama.
Traffic on the M25 is absolutely terrible this morning. Avoid junction 10 if you can. Been stuck for 45 minutes already.
My therapist told me today that I need to stop blaming myself for the divorce. It's been two years but the guilt still eats at me every single day.
Honestly I prefer working from home. The office is fine but I'm more productive when I can set my own schedule.
Minha filha disse 'eu te amo' pela primeira vez hoje. Chorei escondido no banheiro por 10 minutos. Ser mae e tudo.
